body_preview: Replace the wall-clock timeout assertion in `empty_piped_stdin_exits_quickly` with a more reliable mechanism so the test stops failing intermittently in CI. Why this matters: The test `empty_piped_stdin_exits_quickly` (line 1486) asserts that the binary exits within 40 seconds when given empty piped stdin. expected_evidence: The recurring CI failure pattern "thread 'empty_piped_stdin_exits_quickly' panicked" stops appearing in log feedback. Test suite remains green under normal and loaded CI conditions. Implementation Notes: Option A (preferred): Remove the timing assertion entirely. title: De-flake `empty_piped_stdin_exits_quickly` integration test
